Full Route — All Fixes—
All fixes export to the .fpl file and load on the ForeFlight map. Includes departure, en-route VORs, GPS fixes, VFR visual checkpoints, and approach/IAF fixes.

ForeFlight .fpl FileREADY TO UPLOAD
// FOREFLIGHT FPL — XML FLIGHT PLAN FORMAT
—
3-Step Load into ForeFlight
1
Download — click "Download .fpl" above. File saves to your Downloads folder
2
Transfer to iPad — AirDrop the .fpl file to your iPad, or email it to yourself. Tap the file — iOS opens it directly in ForeFlight with all waypoints loaded
3
Verify on map — all waypoints appear as fixes on the ForeFlight moving map. Run the Profile view to check terrain clearance. Pull weather brief within ForeFlight
↺
In-flight updates — tap ⚡ "Update In Flight" in sidebar, enter new runway/weather, hit Apply — re-download the .fpl and re-import to ForeFlight
Quick ForeFlight Deep Link
—
✓ ATC Transcription runs on-device using the Web Speech API — no data sent to any server. Works offline once the browser engine is cached. For aviation-grade accuracy, connect in areas with good signal during the learning period.
Live ATC TranscriberSTOPPED
NOT RECORDING — tap button below to start
FREQUENCY: MHz  |  AIRPORT:
Transcript will appear here...

Tip: Speak clearly into your device microphone. ATC audio piped through a headset jack works best.
ATC Keyword Alerts
Keywords auto-detected: runway change, go around, hold short, traffic alert, wind shear, turbulence. Alerts appear here during transcription.
PilotAvisor AI
Build a flight plan first, then ask me anything — weather, altitude strategy, ForeFlight tips, approach decisions, W&B, NOTAMs, or ATC analysis. Add your Anthropic API key for full AI responses.
